perturbation.original_text: This Agreement will automatically renew for successive one year terms (each a "Renewal Term", and together with the Initial Term, the "Term"), unless either Charterer or Owner elects not to renew this Agreement by providing the other party with written notice of such election 30 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or Renewal Term, as applicable, at which point this Agreement will automatically terminate.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may renew for successive one year terms (each a "Renewal Term", and together with the Initial Term, the "Term"), only if both Charterer and Owner agree in writing to renew this Agreement no later than 30 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or Renewal Term. If such written agreement is not achieved, this Agreement will automatically terminate.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states the agreement will *automatically* renew unless notice is given, while the modified text states that the agreement *may* renew only if both parties *explicitly agree* in writing. This introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the conditions for renewal.
perturbation.contradicted_text: TERM; TERMINATION The initial term of this Agreement shall be for 3 years (the "Initial Term") commencing on the date first set forth above (the "Commencement Date") and ending on the 3rd anniversary of the Commencement Date. This Agreement may renew for successive one year terms (each a "Renewal Term", and together with the Initial Term, the "Term"), only if both Charterer and Owner agree in writing to renew this Agreement no later than 30 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or Renewal Term. If such written agreement is not achieved, this Agreement will automatically terminate. Within 30 days of the end of the Initial Term, and within 30 days of the end of each Renewal Term, both parties hereto shall have the right renegotiate the fee specified below for the use of the vessels. If no such agreement on such fee is reached by such parties by the commencement of a Renewal Term, this Agreement shall automatically terminate. Either party hereto shall have the right to terminate this Agreement in the event of a breach by the other party of its obligations hereunder, subject to 10 days prior written notice of such breach given by the non-breaching party to the breaching party and the opportunity for such breaching party to cure such breach during such 10 day period. Upon any such termination, this Agreement shall thereafter have no further force or effect except as to already accrued rights and obligations, which shall continue until satisfied.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that renewal of the agreement requires *explicit written consent* from both parties, which replaces the original condition of *automatic renewal* unless a party provides notice of non-renewal. The contradicted text contains the exact same language as the changed text, regarding the requirement of explicit written consent. However, the original text states something different which directly conflicts with the changed and contradicted texts. This creates a significant contradiction regarding the renewal process, impacting the rights and obligations of both the Charterer and Owner, and thus meets the criteria for Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction.
